hero.title: We build modern digital experiences.
hero.subtitle: Simple, elegant, and high-performing websites tailored for your business. Designed for human interaction, not AI templates.

about.title: Our Philosophy
about.subtitle: We believe in clean code, visual clarity, and responsive design.
about.content: Founded by a team of dedicated developers, we value software craft. We believe every pixel should serve a purpose, and every line of code should be performant. By avoiding flashy trends, we focus on what really matters: fast page loads, readable typography, and intuitive user experiences that work seamlessly across every screen.

services.title: Web Application Development
services.description: High-performance Single Page Applications (SPAs) built with React, Vite, and clean modular structures.

services.title: Responsive Layout Design
services.description: We ensure your site looks spectacular and functions flawlessly on mobile, tablet, and ultra-wide desktops.

services.title: Search Engine Optimization
services.description: Semantic HTML, structured metadata schema, and lightning-fast loading speeds to help you rank on search engines.

footerText: © 2026 DevFlow Studio. All rights reserved. Built with Vite, React, and Tailwind CSS.
